description: Structural contract for tdd-report.md handoff artifacts (C2-handoff-schemas). The TDD phase writes failing tests for each acceptance criterion before Builder begins.

required_first_line.fail_message: challenge token missing from line 1 — report may be a forgery

required_sections.name: tests_written
required_sections.fail_message: ## Tests Written (or ANCHOR:tests_written) missing — TDD must enumerate the failing tests it authored

required_sections.name: ac_mapping
required_sections.fail_message: ## AC Mapping (or ANCHOR:ac_mapping) missing — TDD must map each test to a Scout acceptance criterion

required_sections.name: red_state
required_sections.fail_message: ## Red State (or ANCHOR:red_state) missing — TDD must confirm all new tests fail before Builder begins

required_content.name: red_count
required_content.fail_message: no RED/FAIL marker found — TDD must show evidence the new tests start red
